content.subTitle: Introduction
content: Eurasia Tours founded in 2000, is one of the professional travel agencies designated by Atout France(French Office of tourism) to receive Chinese tourists. We are licensed by Atout France to welcome Chinese tourists and insured by GROUPAMA FranceASSURANCES (French Insurance Company) under N'AA145293 and hold the French National Tourism License (IM075120157).

Our company inherits the advanced concept of the international mature tourism market from Europe, fully exploits the political, business and cultural tourism resource advantages of China and Europe, all year-round to provide Europe travels, business visits, exhibitions, study tours and exchanges, casual travel, cruise and international flight tickets, and other high-standard customized services.

We are committed to provide trips to Europe to connect the ground service to various types of organizations, as well as North America and the Asia-Africa region of the Chinese diaspora. On the basis of maintaining the traditional benefits of official conventions and exhibitions, business visits, economic and trade cooperation, our company has constantly responded to the market needs by launching new and colorful service programs, such as self-help special tours, winter/summer camps, Europe self-driving tours, bicycle riding tours...

We also organize regular and special group tours for French tourists to Asian countries (such as Japan, Vietnam, Cambodia, Uzbekistan, etc.) for cultural, business, cycling, trekking and student exchange activities. There are over 30 regular itineraries for groups. Tours in China include Beijing, Xi'an, Guilin and Shanghai, as well as in-depth tours of special regions such as Yunnan, Chengdu, Tibet, Shanxi, Anhui, Guizhou and the Silk Road, which are highly appreciated by French tourists.

In 2024, Eurasia Tours was strategically invested by GTT International Travel Group and became the first European subsidiary of GTT. GTT International Travel Group was founded in 1984 in Dallas, Texas, and has more than 45 branches located in major cities across the United States. GTT has over 600 multilingual employees and a professional management team. As the largest first-class air ticket agent, wholesale center and trans-Pacific airline in North America, with a 35% market share in North America: annual air ticket sales of 1.75 million tickets and annual sales of more than US$2 billion.
GTT International Travel Group has branches in Asia including Shanghai, Beijing, Wuhan, Guangzhou, Taipei, Hong Kong, Ho Chi Minh City, Delhi and Manila.

content.subTitle: Outbound tourism
content: The destinations cover Asia, North America and other regions; Organization of various sightseeing tours: study tours, business tours, special sports tours...

content.subTitle: Inbound tourism
content: The destinations cover Europe, Africa and other regions;

In addition to traditional programs such as official conventions and exhibitions, business visits, economic and trade cooperation, we also offer leisure and vacation tours, in-depth tours, self-help specialty tours, winter/summer camps, Europe self-driving tours, cycling tours, and other sports programs;
From 2024 onwards, we also offer trips to Europe for tourists from various countries, including North America and Southeast Asia.

content.subTitle: Awards and Achievements
content: Eurasia Tours has been certified by the Petit Futé Travel Guide (founded in 1976, the equivalent of MICHELIN in the restaurant industry) for several years.
Association Professionnelle de Solidarité du Tourisme (APST), Eurasia Tours accepts the support and encouragement of all professionals and our customers.

content.subTitle: Long-term stable partner of our company
content: Since its inception, Eurasia Tours has built up a broad and stable network of partners, working closely with a number of outstanding partner companies. These partner companies cover a wide range of fields, including, but not limited to, all kinds of high-end hotels, ticket companies, cruise lines, car dealerships and so on.
